>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/dropdown/version/filter/fc/programs"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a list of versions for a list of dataset programs

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}},"description":"The list of program IDs for the version list","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"string"}}},"description":"Returns the list of versions for a list of dataset programs"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode_DropDownView"}}},"description":"Internal error that prevented the retrieval of the list of versions"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
